name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointGunHelper.ClavicleBlend
summary: How much of blend should come from incoming transforms 0(all IK) .. 1(all ITMs)   For pointing arms only.  (Support arm uses the IK solution as is for clavicles).
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
